channel.title: Philip Dauth Archives - Dauth Family Archive

image.title: Philip Dauth Archives - Dauth Family Archive

item.title: 1900 – Census – Philip Dauth
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post 1900 – Census – Philip Dauth appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
1900 – Census – Philip Dauth
Shows that Elsie's birth name is Elizabeth and that Fred's full name is Frederick.

People
Philip Dauth
Elsie Dauth
Katie Dauth
Amelia Dauth
Louisa Dauth
Phil Dauth
Fred Dauth

Details
Date: 1900
Location: USA, Colorado, Denver
Source: U.S. Census Bureau [USA, Colorado, Denver], 1900
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/document/1900-census-philip-dauth/

The post 1900 – Census – Philip Dauth appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.

item.title: 1890 – Denver Directory – Philip Dauth Wire and Iron Works Advertisement
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post 1890 – Denver Directory – Philip Dauth Wire and Iron Works Advertisement appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
1890 – Denver Directory – Philip Dauth Wire and Iron Works Advertisement

Transcription
"R. W. Bailey., P. C. Brueggemann., Ph. Dauth; Rocky Mountain Wire and Iron Works; Ornamental Iron, Wire and Brass Work.; Wire and Iron Railings, Window Guards, Grille Work, Sand Screens, Fences and Stable Fixtures.; 1847 Lawrence St., Denver Colo. "

People
Philip Dauth

Details
Date: 1890
Location: USA, Colorado, Denver
Source: Denver Directory [USA, Colorado, Denver], 1890, p. 22 [Section]
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/document/1890-denver-directory-philip-dauth-wire-and-iron-works-advertisement/

The post 1890 – Denver Directory – Philip Dauth Wire and Iron Works Advertisement appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
